---
title: "Keyboard Shortcuts"
---

Editable elements support keyboard navigation for accessibility and efficient editing.

## Element Navigation

| Key           | Action                                            |
|---------------|---------------------------------------------------|
| Tab           | Focus an editable element (controls will appear)  |
| Shift + Tab   | Exit and return to normal slide navigation        |
| Escape        | Exit modify mode without activating; focus returns to the Modify button |

## Moving Elements

| Key        | Action                            |
|------------|-----------------------------------|
| Arrow keys | Move the element (10px per press) |

## Resizing Elements

| Key                | Action             |
|--------------------|---------------------|
| Shift + Arrow keys | Resize the element |

## Rotating Elements

| Key                                  | Action        |
|--------------------------------------|---------------|
| Ctrl/Cmd + Left/Right arrows         | Rotate by 5°  |
| Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + Left/Right arrows | Rotate by 15° |

## Undo/Redo

| Key                                         | Action           |
|---------------------------------------------|------------------|
| Ctrl+Z (Cmd+Z on Mac)                       | Undo last action |
| Ctrl+Y or Ctrl+Shift+Z (Cmd+Shift+Z on Mac) | Redo             |

## Notes

- All control buttons on editable elements are keyboard accessible
- Text content editing (in edit mode) uses the browser's native undo, which is separate from the extension's undo stack
